description: Reconstruct the path of Hurricane Katrina in gvSIG using the raw GPS data provided in /home/ga/Documents/katrina_waypoints.csv. The data rows are shuffled and must be ordered using the SEQ field to create a chronological track. Generate a Polyline shapefile representing the storm's path and save it to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/katrina_track.shp.
